name: EX-NEXT Updater
description: Flash firmware to the KO Propo EX-NEXT transmitter's master and Xpansion units.
notes: Portable exe - unzip and run, no installer. English and Japanese manuals ship inside the zip. Deliberately has NO version_check: the support page advertises the EX-NEXT *firmware* version (3.02+), not this updater app, which has stayed at V1.00 since 2021 - a version_check there would report the tool permanently outdated. Firmware payloads are separate downloads from the same page. Needs the ICS USB Adapter HS (#61028, red label - the black #61018 does not work). The exe name contains 'UpDater', which installer._find_exe's skip-list would reject, so exe_relative_path must stay pinned.
